A

add(CollegeBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CollegeModel
Commits a new College instance profile into the persistent storage engine layers.
add(CourseBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CourseModel
Commits a new Course instance profile into the persistent storage engine layers.
add(FacultyBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.FacultyModel
Commits a new Faculty instance profile into the persistent storage engine layers.
add(MarksheetBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.MarksheetModel
Commits a new Marksheet instance profile into the persistent storage engine layers.
add(RoleBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.RoleModel
Adds a new Role record to the database after validating that the role name does not already exist.
add(StudentBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.StudentModel
Adds a new Student record to the database after verifying that the email ID is unique and resolving the associated college name.
add(SubjectBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.SubjectModel
Adds a new Subject record to the database after verifying that the subject name is unique and resolving its dependency details from CourseModel.
add(TimetableBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Adds a new Timetable record after fetching course and subject details.
add(UserBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Adds a new user record.
address - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.CollegeBean
Address of the college
ADMIN - Static variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.RoleBean
Administrator role
APP_CONTEXT - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
The root context path string for the web deployment module.
APP_DATE_FORMAT - Static variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataUtility
Default Application Date Format pattern.
APP_TIME_FORMAT - Static variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataUtility
Default Application Time Format pattern.
ApplicationException - Exception in in.co.rays.proj4.exception
ApplicationException is a generic checked exception thrown when an internal business logic or structural application error occurs within the system processing layers.
ApplicationException(String) - Constructor for exception in.co.rays.proj4.exception.ApplicationException
Constructs a new ApplicationException with the specified detailed error message.
authenticate(String, String) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Authenticates user using login & password.
